chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI M.A. NO.44, 46 AND 47 OF 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.09.2021 Mr. Hassan Mandviwala advocate for appellant. Mr. Farruq Usman advocate for respondent No.2................ Learned counsel for petitioner seeks time for want of instructions on the issue whether terms and conditions of ticket purchase include insurance amount. Concerned officer shall be present alongwith SOPs/byelaws dealing with insurance on tickets and reclaims. Office shall place a copy of this order in connected M.As. J U D G E IK
